items.title: Global Checkout Conversion Release
items.description: Release focused on better checkout completion and authorization success through payment-method ordering, buyer UX refinement, and approval optimization.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the share of legitimate payment attempts that become captured payments.
Improve card and wallet payment success on legitimate demand.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve retained merchant volume through better conversion quality.

productBricks.change: Improve hosted checkout conversion patterns and localization.
Improve recovery and approval optimization on legitimate attempts.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated payment method and authorization APIs.

items.title: Recurring Revenue Recovery Release
items.description: Release focused on usage-based billing operability, smarter collections, and lower involuntary churn for recurring businesses.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase recovered value before failed renewals become churn.
Reduce time needed to launch pricing and packaging updates.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase multi-product attach in recurring-revenue cohorts.

productBricks.change: Improve pricing and subscription configuration workflows.
Improve meter definition and usage visibility.
Improve retry, reminder, and collections behavior.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated billing and collections operator workflows.
Release updated subscription and metering APIs.

items.title: Connect Activation and Payout Reliability Release
items.description: Release focused on faster connected-account activation, clearer onboarding remediation, and stronger payout reliability for platforms.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase supply activation in qualified onboarding cohorts.
Improve payout predictability for platform counterparties.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve platform volume growth through lower activation and payout drag.

productBricks.change: Improve connected-account requirement visibility and activation state explanations.
Improve remediation guidance on failed or incomplete verification.
Improve payout scheduling transparency and exception handling.

deliveryChannels.change: Release supporting onboarding and payout services.

items.title: Finance Trust and Tax Release
items.description: Release focused on tax obligation visibility, revenue reporting trust, and lower reconciliation exceptions across merchant and recurring-revenue customers.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve confidence in global monetization readiness.
Reduce material discrepancies in recurring-revenue reporting.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase product trust and attach in finance-sensitive accounts.

productBricks.change: Improve obligation monitoring and registration workflow support.
Improve recognition visibility and export reliability.
Improve balance and payout investigation workflows.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated tax, reporting, and reconciliation workflows.
Release updated exports and finance-facing data surfaces.
